name: meridian-healthcare
description: Healthcare intelligence skills for population health, risk analysis, cohort identification, and governed data access. Built for care managers, analysts, and data teams working with claims, pharmacy, SDOH, and clinical data.

interface.shortDescription: Population health skills with governed A2A access: cohorts, risk drivers, outreach, charts
interface.longDescription: A complete healthcare intelligence toolkit for Codex with governed agent-to-agent access. Includes skills for querying member cohorts, analyzing risk drivers, generating outreach recommendations, and building chart aggregates — all with role-based governance, field masking, and audit logging. Features human-in-the-loop governance gates where users must approve access before data flows. Designed for Drizzle ORM + Turso/SQLite.
defaultPrompt: Find high-risk diabetic members in TX and FL with transportation barriers
Analyze risk drivers for member M-1042 and recommend outreach
Generate a bar chart of members by risk tier
Explain why member M-1100 was flagged as high risk
Run the governance demo — show me how role-based access control works
Query high-risk members as an analyst role with governance approval
